S.FORM: babah su' ka magabuq cuqang, mausa' si' inu'?
S.PHON: βaβaħ s~ɕuʔ ka maɣaβuq ʦ~ʨuqaŋ, maus~ɕaʔ s~ɕiʔ inuʔ?
S.FORM: babah su' ka magabuq cuqang, mausa' si' inu'?

S.FORM: ma'usa' cu 'i' tinqalangan mital 'i' yaya' ki' yaba'.
S.PHON: maʔus~ɕaʔ ʦ~ʨu ʔiʔ tinqalaŋan mital ʔiʔ jajaʔ kiʔ jaβaʔ.
S.FORM: ma'usa' cu 'i' tinqalangan mital 'i' yaya' ki' yaba'.
S.PHON: maʔus~ɕaʔ ʦ~ʨu ʔiʔ tinqalaŋan mital ʔiʔ jajaʔ kiʔ jaβaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 我要回（去）部落探望父母。

S.FORM: balaiq kahbag naha', mahway su' cubalay.
S.PHON: βalaiq kaħβaɣ naħaʔ, maħwaj s~ɕuʔ ʦ~ʨuβalaj.
S.FORM: balaiq kahbag naha', mahway su' cubalay.
S.PHON: βalaiq kaħβaɣ naħaʔ, maħwaj s~ɕuʔ ʦ~ʨuβalaj.
maʔus~ɕaʔ s~ɕuʔ ʔiʔ pijaʔ ʦ~ʨuʔ riax.
maʔus~ɕaʔ s~ɕuʔ ʔiʔ pijaʔ ʦ~ʨuʔ riax.

S.FORM: muwani ga, makitalay ta' 'i' casan. nahahiyaw ki'.
S.PHON: muwani ɣa, makitalaj taʔ ʔiʔ ʦ~ʨas~ɕan. naħaħijaw kiʔ.
S.FORM: muwani ga, makitalay ta' 'i' casan. nahahiyaw ki'.
S.PHON: muwani ɣa, makitalaj taʔ ʔiʔ ʦ~ʨas~ɕan. naħaħijaw kiʔ.
maɣalɣaj tiʔ mus~ɕaʔ ʔiʔ taβilas~ɕ quw?
maɣalɣaj tiʔ mus~ɕaʔ ʔiʔ taβilas~ɕ quw?

S.FORM: tila' ga, bali' kiya' waw mu 'i' casan.
S.PHON: tilaʔ ɣa, βaliʔ kijaʔ waw mu ʔiʔ ʦ~ʨas~ɕan.
S.FORM: tila' ga, bali' kiya' waw mu 'i' casan.
S.PHON: tilaʔ ɣa, βaliʔ kijaʔ waw mu ʔiʔ ʦ~ʨas~ɕan.
S.TRANSL: 好阿，反正我明天沒有事。

S.FORM: balaiq su' quw? ralu' mu ga Yawi' na' kyusi. ima' a' ralu' su'?
S.PHON: βalaiq s~ɕuʔ quw? raluʔ mu ɣa jawiʔ naʔ kjus~ɕi. imaʔ aʔ raluʔ s~ɕuʔ?
S.FORM: balaiq su' quw? ralu' mu ga Yawi' na' kyusi. ima' a' ralu' su'?
S.PHON: βalaiq s~ɕuʔ quw? raluʔ mu ɣa jawiʔ naʔ kjus~ɕi. imaʔ aʔ raluʔ s~ɕuʔ?
S.TRANSL: 你好，我叫Yawi’ na’ kyusi，請問，你叫什麼名字？

S.FORM: ralu' mu ga Lawa' na' Yukih.
S.PHON: raluʔ mu ɣa lawaʔ naʔ jukiħ.
S.FORM: ralu' mu ga Lawa' na' Yukih.
S.PHON: raluʔ mu ɣa lawaʔ naʔ jukiħ.

S.FORM: Gipun na' 'i' hiya' muwah 'i' Tabilas 'i' mkibaq cu' kai' na' matu'uwal.
S.PHON: ɣipun naʔ ʔiʔ ħijaʔ muwaħ ʔiʔ taβilas~ɕ ʔiʔ mkiβaq ʦ~ʨuʔ kaiʔ naʔ matuʔuwal.
S.FORM: Gipun na' 'i' hiya' muwah 'i' Tabilas 'i' mkibaq cu' kai' na' matu'uwal.
S.PHON: ɣipun naʔ ʔiʔ ħijaʔ muwaħ ʔiʔ taβilas~ɕ ʔiʔ mkiβaq ʦ~ʨuʔ kaiʔ naʔ matuʔuwal.
S.TRANSL: 他是（日本）人，來錦水村學汶水語。

S.FORM: sumiwa' cu' gaga' ru kaikai' na' Itaal 'i' hiya'.
S.PHON: s~ɕumiwaʔ ʦ~ʨuʔ ɣaɣaʔ ru kaikaiʔ naʔ itaal ʔiʔ ħijaʔ.
S.FORM: sumiwa' cu' gaga' ru kaikai' na' Itaal 'i' hiya'.
S.PHON: s~ɕumiwaʔ ʦ~ʨuʔ ɣaɣaʔ ru kaikaiʔ naʔ itaal ʔiʔ ħijaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他對汶水泰雅文化很有興趣。

S.FORM: paqasun mu cubalay makital ki' isu'.
S.PHON: paqas~ɕun mu ʦ~ʨuβalaj makital kiʔ is~ɕuʔ.

S.FORM: pasibaq ci' cu' kai' na' matu'uwal.
S.PHON: pas~ɕiβaq ʦ~ʨiʔ ʦ~ʨuʔ kaiʔ naʔ matuʔuwal.
S.FORM: pasibaq ci' cu' kai' na' matu'uwal.
S.PHON: pas~ɕiβaq ʦ~ʨiʔ ʦ~ʨuʔ kaiʔ naʔ matuʔuwal.

S.FORM: kai' na' nanuwan ku' sipsibaq su'?
S.PHON: kaiʔ naʔ nanuwan kuʔ s~ɕips~ɕiβaq s~ɕuʔ?
S.FORM: kai' na' nanuwan ku' sipsibaq su'?

S.FORM: kiya' ci' pasibaq cu' kai' na' matu'uwal 'i' Tabilas ga.
S.PHON: kijaʔ ʦ~ʨiʔ pas~ɕiβaq ʦ~ʨuʔ kaiʔ naʔ matuʔuwal ʔiʔ taβilas~ɕ ɣa.
S.FORM: kiya' ci' pasibaq cu' kai' na' matu'uwal 'i' Tabilas ga.

S.FORM: balaiq su' 'i' pasibaq ci' cu' kai' na' matu'uwal quw?
S.PHON: βalaiq s~ɕuʔ ʔiʔ pas~ɕiβaq ʦ~ʨiʔ ʦ~ʨuʔ kaiʔ naʔ matuʔuwal quw?

S.FORM: masiqaiyung ci' cubalay la kiya' a' nanuwan ka nananiqun quw?
S.PHON: mas~ɕiqaijuŋ ʦ~ʨiʔ ʦ~ʨuβalaj la kijaʔ aʔ nanuwan ka nananiqun quw?
S.FORM: masiqaiyung ci' cubalay la kiya' a' nanuwan ka nananiqun quw?
S.PHON: mas~ɕiqaijuŋ ʦ~ʨiʔ ʦ~ʨuβalaj la kijaʔ aʔ nanuwan ka nananiqun quw?
S.TRANSL: 我的肚子好餓，有東西可以吃嗎？

S.FORM: ini mu katngiani ku' pilikaway makimaniq ci' cu' mami.
S.PHON: ini mu katŋiani kuʔ pilikawaj makimaniq ʦ~ʨiʔ ʦ~ʨuʔ mami.
S.FORM: ini mu katngiani ku' pilikaway makimaniq ci' cu' mami.
S.PHON: ini mu katŋiani kuʔ pilikawaj makimaniq ʦ~ʨiʔ ʦ~ʨuʔ mami.
S.TRANSL: 李子吃不飽，我想要吃飯。

S.FORM: wal, halngaganay misu' cu' mami' ru qaniq. nanuwan ku' balaiq su' na?
S.PHON: wal, ħalŋaɣanaj mis~ɕuʔ ʦ~ʨuʔ mamiʔ ru qaniq. nanuwan kuʔ βalaiq s~ɕuʔ na?
S.FORM: wal, halngaganay misu' cu' mami' ru qaniq. nanuwan ku' balaiq su' na?
S.PHON: wal, ħalŋaɣanaj mis~ɕuʔ ʦ~ʨuʔ mamiʔ ru qaniq. nanuwan kuʔ βalaiq s~ɕuʔ na?
S.TRANSL: 好，我炒飯給你吃，你還要什麼嗎？

S.FORM: mahuway su', malngu' a' ngaquwaq pakaakih 'i' maiq su' cu' qusiya quw?
S.PHON: maħuwaj s~ɕuʔ, malŋuʔ aʔ ŋaquwaq pakaakiħ ʔiʔ maiq s~ɕuʔ ʦ~ʨuʔ qus~ɕija quw?
S.FORM: mahuway su', malngu' a' ngaquwaq pakaakih 'i' maiq su' cu' qusiya quw?
S.PHON: maħuwaj s~ɕuʔ, malŋuʔ aʔ ŋaquwaq pakaakiħ ʔiʔ maiq s~ɕuʔ ʦ~ʨuʔ qus~ɕija quw?
S.TRANSL: 謝謝，我口渴，能給我一點水嗎？

S.FORM: qutux kuwing cu' riax musa' 'i' matawwaw cku' ragriyax sawni, masawsug ku' kukuy mu ru pakahngaw cu' la.
S.PHON: qutux kuwiŋ ʦ~ʨuʔ riax mus~ɕaʔ ʔiʔ matawwaw ʦ~ʨkuʔ raɣrijax s~ɕawni, mas~ɕaws~ɕuɣ kuʔ kukuj mu ru pakaħŋaw ʦ~ʨuʔ la.
S.FORM: qutux kuwing cu' riax musa' 'i' matawwaw cku' ragriyax sawni, masawsug ku' kukuy mu ru pakahngaw cu' la.
S.PHON: qutux kuwiŋ ʦ~ʨuʔ riax mus~ɕaʔ ʔiʔ matawwaw ʦ~ʨkuʔ raɣrijax s~ɕawni, mas~ɕaws~ɕuɣ kuʔ kukuj mu ru pakaħŋaw ʦ~ʨuʔ la.
S.TRANSL: 今天去山上工作一整天，現在腿好痠，需要休息。

S.PHON: naβuwiβuwiʔ us~ɕaʔ ʔiʔ maħŋaw ʦ~ʨkuʔ tatħawkan.
naβuwiβuwiʔ us~ɕaʔ ʔiʔ maħŋaw ʦ~ʨkuʔ tatħawkan.

S.FORM: payux ku' rinuwang mu, pakaaqih su' siagal cu' cacaybing 'i' kwing quw?
S.PHON: pajux kuʔ rinuwaŋ mu, pakaaqiħ s~ɕuʔ s~ɕiaɣal ʦ~ʨuʔ ʦ~ʨaʦ~ʨajβiŋ ʔiʔ kwiŋ quw?
S.FORM: payux ku' rinuwang mu, pakaaqih su' siagal cu' cacaybing 'i' kwing quw?
S.PHON: pajux kuʔ rinuwaŋ mu, pakaaqiħ s~ɕuʔ s~ɕiaɣal ʦ~ʨuʔ ʦ~ʨaʦ~ʨajβiŋ ʔiʔ kwiŋ quw?
S.TRANSL: 我流了很多汗，可以幫我拿毛巾嗎？

S.FORM: wal ga, halayanay misu magal ku' cacaybing.
S.PHON: wal ɣa, ħalajanaj mis~ɕu maɣal kuʔ ʦ~ʨaʦ~ʨajβiŋ.
S.FORM: wal ga, halayanay misu magal ku' cacaybing.
S.PHON: wal ɣa, ħalajanaj mis~ɕu maɣal kuʔ ʦ~ʨaʦ~ʨajβiŋ.

S.FORM: balaiq a' kaal sawni halhul ku' wagi'.
S.PHON: βalaiq aʔ kaal s~ɕawni ħalħul kuʔ waɣiʔ.
S.FORM: balaiq a' kaal sawni halhul ku' wagi'.
S.PHON: βalaiq aʔ kaal s~ɕawni ħalħul kuʔ waɣiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 今天天氣很好，陽光很溫暖。

S.FORM: balaiq mu uwi ku' kaal sawni. aqih mu ku' qumuwalax.
S.PHON: βalaiq mu uwi kuʔ kaal s~ɕawni. aqiħ mu kuʔ qumuwalax.
S.FORM: balaiq mu uwi ku' kaal sawni. aqih mu ku' qumuwalax.
S.PHON: βalaiq mu uwi kuʔ kaal s~ɕawni. aqiħ mu kuʔ qumuwalax.
S.TRANSL: 我也喜歡今天的天氣，不喜歡下雨。

S.FORM: pungan ku' kai' ga, asi ga paquwalax 'i' casan.
S.PHON: puŋan kuʔ kaiʔ ɣa, as~ɕi ɣa paquwalax ʔiʔ ʦ~ʨas~ɕan.
S.FORM: pungan ku' kai' ga, asi ga paquwalax 'i' casan.
S.PHON: puŋan kuʔ kaiʔ ɣa, as~ɕi ɣa paquwalax ʔiʔ ʦ~ʨas~ɕan.
S.TRANSL: 氣象預報說明天會下雨。

S.FORM: musa' si' inu' ga, ungiay su' maras cu' tata'umuk ki'.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕiʔ inuʔ ɣa, uŋiaj s~ɕuʔ maras~ɕ ʦ~ʨuʔ tataʔumuk kiʔ.
S.FORM: musa' si' inu' ga, ungiay su' maras cu' tata'umuk ki'.

S.FORM: kaa' ungii' rasani cu' qutux cu' tata'umuk 'i' yaba'.
S.PHON: kaaʔ uŋiiʔ ras~ɕani ʦ~ʨuʔ qutux ʦ~ʨuʔ tataʔumuk ʔiʔ jaβaʔ.
S.FORM: kaa' ungii' rasani cu' qutux cu' tata'umuk 'i' yaba'.
S.PHON: kaaʔ uŋiiʔ ras~ɕani ʦ~ʨuʔ qutux ʦ~ʨuʔ tataʔumuk ʔiʔ jaβaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 別忘了幫爸爸帶一支雨傘。

S.FORM: wal ga. rasanai mu cu' tata'umuk 'i' yaba'.
S.PHON: wal ɣa. ras~ɕanai mu ʦ~ʨuʔ tataʔumuk ʔiʔ jaβaʔ.
S.FORM: wal ga. rasanai mu cu' tata'umuk 'i' yaba'.
S.PHON: wal ɣa. ras~ɕanai mu ʦ~ʨuʔ tataʔumuk ʔiʔ jaβaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 好的，我會記得帶爸爸的傘。

S.FORM: piya' cu' buwating ru piya' cu' riax sawni?
S.PHON: pijaʔ ʦ~ʨuʔ βuwatiŋ ru pijaʔ ʦ~ʨuʔ riax s~ɕawni?
S.FORM: piya' cu' buwating ru piya' cu' riax sawni?
S.PHON: pijaʔ ʦ~ʨuʔ βuwatiŋ ru pijaʔ ʦ~ʨuʔ riax s~ɕawni?

S.FORM: mamatu' cu' buwating ru imagal cu' riax sawni.
S.PHON: mamatuʔ ʦ~ʨuʔ βuwatiŋ ru imaɣal ʦ~ʨuʔ riax s~ɕawni.

S.PHON: mamatuʔ ʦ~ʨuʔ βuwatiŋ ru imaɣal ʦ~ʨuʔ riax s~ɕawni.

S.FORM: gumawah ku' sasukuan cu' pila' ru sumatu' cu' pinpinatiq 'i' mamatu' cu' riax quw?
S.PHON: ɣumawaħ kuʔ s~ɕas~ɕukuan ʦ~ʨuʔ pilaʔ ru s~ɕumatuʔ ʦ~ʨuʔ pinpinatiq ʔiʔ mamatuʔ ʦ~ʨuʔ riax quw?
S.FORM: gumawah ku' sasukuan cu' pila' ru sumatu' cu' pinpinatiq 'i' mamatu' cu' riax quw?
S.PHON: ɣumawaħ kuʔ s~ɕas~ɕukuan ʦ~ʨuʔ pilaʔ ru s~ɕumatuʔ ʦ~ʨuʔ pinpinatiq ʔiʔ mamatuʔ ʦ~ʨuʔ riax quw?

S.FORM: kiya' ga, gumawah 'i' kasasanan nanaq ru manaaring cu' mamaspat cu' pancapngan wagi' ru magalpu cu' rusa' pancapngan wagi' nanaq.
S.PHON: kijaʔ ɣa, ɣumawaħ ʔiʔ kas~ɕas~ɕanan nanaq ru manaariŋ ʦ~ʨuʔ mamas~ɕpat ʦ~ʨuʔ panʦ~ʨapŋan waɣiʔ ru maɣalpu ʦ~ʨuʔ rus~ɕaʔ panʦ~ʨapŋan waɣiʔ nanaq.
S.FORM: kiya' ga, gumawah 'i' kasasanan nanaq ru manaaring cu' mamaspat cu' pancapngan wagi' ru magalpu cu' rusa' pancapngan wagi' nanaq.
S.PHON: kijaʔ ɣa, ɣumawaħ ʔiʔ kas~ɕas~ɕanan nanaq ru manaariŋ ʦ~ʨuʔ mamas~ɕpat ʦ~ʨuʔ panʦ~ʨapŋan waɣiʔ ru maɣalpu ʦ~ʨuʔ rus~ɕaʔ panʦ~ʨapŋan waɣiʔ nanaq.
S.TRANSL: 有，但是只有早上開，從8點到12點。

S.FORM: piya' pancapngan cu' wagi' ka hani la?
S.PHON: pijaʔ panʦ~ʨapŋan ʦ~ʨuʔ waɣiʔ ka ħani la?
S.FORM: piya' pancapngan cu' wagi' ka hani la?

S.FORM: magalpu cu' qun ru maspatul cu' pacapngan ka hani.
S.PHON: maɣalpu ʦ~ʨuʔ qun ru mas~ɕpatul ʦ~ʨuʔ paʦ~ʨapŋan ka ħani.
S.FORM: magalpu cu' qun ru maspatul cu' pacapngan ka hani.
S.PHON: maɣalpu ʦ~ʨuʔ qun ru mas~ɕpatul ʦ~ʨuʔ paʦ~ʨapŋan ka ħani.

S.FORM: macka' ku' pancapngan cu' wagi' su' quw?
S.PHON: maʦ~ʨkaʔ kuʔ panʦ~ʨapŋan ʦ~ʨuʔ waɣiʔ s~ɕuʔ quw?
S.FORM: macka' ku' pancapngan cu' wagi' su' quw?

S.FORM: haylag cu' magalpu pancapngan cu' wagi' mu ru yani cubalay ku' riax ka hani ga magalpu cu' qutux cakaan cu' pancapngan cu' wagi'.
S.PHON: ħajlaɣ ʦ~ʨuʔ maɣalpu panʦ~ʨapŋan ʦ~ʨuʔ waɣiʔ mu ru jani ʦ~ʨuβalaj kuʔ riax ka ħani ɣa maɣalpu ʦ~ʨuʔ qutux ʦ~ʨakaan ʦ~ʨuʔ panʦ~ʨapŋan ʦ~ʨuʔ waɣiʔ.

S.TRANSL: 我的錶快了10分鐘，正確時間是11點半。

S.FORM: paqucay misu' han. kiya' sasukuan cu' pila' ru sumatu' cu' ruwas 'i' lalingay 'i' runi quw?
S.PHON: paquʦ~ʨaj mis~ɕuʔ ħan. kijaʔ s~ɕas~ɕukuan ʦ~ʨuʔ pilaʔ ru s~ɕumatuʔ ʦ~ʨuʔ ruwas~ɕ ʔiʔ laliŋaj ʔiʔ runi quw?
S.FORM: paqucay misu' han. kiya' sasukuan cu' pila' ru sumatu' cu' ruwas 'i' lalingay 'i' runi quw?
S.PHON: paquʦ~ʨaj mis~ɕuʔ ħan. kijaʔ s~ɕas~ɕukuan ʦ~ʨuʔ pilaʔ ru s~ɕumatuʔ ʦ~ʨuʔ ruwas~ɕ ʔiʔ laliŋaj ʔiʔ runi quw?
S.TRANSL: 請問這附近有沒有郵局？

S.FORM: kiya' ga, usaing ku' sasukuan cu' pila' ru sumatu' cu' ruwas.
S.PHON: kijaʔ ɣa, us~ɕaiŋ kuʔ s~ɕas~ɕukuan ʦ~ʨuʔ pilaʔ ru s~ɕumatuʔ ʦ~ʨuʔ ruwas~ɕ.

S.FORM: paqucay misu' han humicuwa'' i' musa' capang na' kinsawbih na' sasukuan cu' pila' ru sumatu' cu' ruwas 'i' runi.

S.TRANSL: 一個月了。但她的病時好時壞。

S.TRANSL: 那麼，這個星期，誰來照顧小孩？

S.FORM: 'i' kuwing nanaq ku' pakalahang. kasasanan ga satuun mu ku' ulaqi' 'i' matas ru mahahapuy cu 'i' qalaiyan gi minaalu' ci' mahahapuy ni' yaya'.
S.PHON: ʔiʔ kuwiŋ nanaq kuʔ pakalaħaŋ. kas~ɕas~ɕanan ɣa s~ɕatuun mu kuʔ ulaqiʔ ʔiʔ matas~ɕ ru maħaħapuj ʦ~ʨu ʔiʔ qalaijan ɣi minaaluʔ ʦ~ʨiʔ maħaħapuj niʔ jajaʔ.
S.FORM: 'i' kuwing nanaq ku' pakalahang. kasasanan ga satuun mu ku' ulaqi' 'i' matas ru mahahapuy cu 'i' qalaiyan gi minaalu' ci' mahahapuy ni' yaya'.

S.TRANSL: 由我照顧，早上送小孩上學，中午煮飯，身兼母職。

S.FORM: lawkah su' quw? 'i' Yawi na' Kyusi ku' ralu' mu. papatasan na' Mabawtuan ku' hani quw?

S.TRANSL: 喂，你好，我是Yawi na’Kyusi。請問是清安國小嗎？

S.FORM: paqucay misu' han kiya' 'i' Lawa na' Yumin quw?
S.PHON: paquʦ~ʨaj mis~ɕuʔ ħan kijaʔ ʔiʔ lawa naʔ jumin quw?

S.TRANSL: 請問Lawa’ na’ Yumin 在嗎？

S.FORM: ukas 'i' tathawnakan niya'. kiya' cku' papakalan.

S.TRANSL: 他不在位置上，他在開會。

S.FORM: pakabalaiq su' 'i' subilan cu' kai' 'i' hiya' quw?

S.TRANSL: 麻煩請他回電話給我，我的名字是Yawi na’ Kyusi。謝謝你。

S.FORM: 'i' Yawi na' Kyusi su' quw'? ralu' mu ga Lawa' na' Yumin. nanuwan ku' waw ka sikyum si' kuwing.

S.TRANSL: 你是Yawi na’ Kyusi 嗎？我的名字是Lawa’ na’ Yumin 有什麼事找我嗎？

S.FORM: papatasan na' Tabilas i' runi. qutux ka buwating ka uniyal ga, papakal cami cku' gaga na' Itaal.

S.TRANSL: 汶水國小在下個月要舉辦原住民文化祭。

S.TRANSL: 想邀請貴校（清安國小）到我們學校表演。

S.FORM: wal ga, nanu qiniaw ta' makal.

S.FORM: wal ga, nanu qiniaw ta' makal.

S.TRANSL: 這家店的糯米飯跟我媽媽做的味道很像，甜甜的，很好吃。

S.FORM: tinmamian uwi ga asing ku' tinmamian ni' yaya' uwi tatimu' ru tahahuway a' qinnaniq mu.
S.PHON: tinmamian uwi ɣa as~ɕiŋ kuʔ tinmamian niʔ jajaʔ uwi tatimuʔ ru taħaħuwaj aʔ qinnaniq mu.

S.TRANSL: 醃肉也跟我媽媽做的味道一樣，夠鹹，很合我的胃口。

S.FORM: naniqun na' Itaal 'i' cunga ga, balaiq cubalay ku' kinsawkan niya'.
S.PHON: naniqun naʔ itaal ʔiʔ ʦ~ʨuŋa ɣa, βalaiq ʦ~ʨuβalaj kuʔ kins~ɕawkan nijaʔ.

S.TRANSL: 我們的傳統料理真的很美味。

S.FORM: manaaring cu' 'i' lumanglung cku' kinabalaiq ni' yaya' mu ka raramat.
S.PHON: manaariŋ ʦ~ʨuʔ ʔiʔ lumaŋluŋ ʦ~ʨkuʔ kinaβalaiq niʔ jajaʔ mu ka raramat.
S.FORM: manaaring cu' 'i' lumanglung cku' kinabalaiq ni' yaya' mu ka raramat.
S.PHON: manaariŋ ʦ~ʨuʔ ʔiʔ lumaŋluŋ ʦ~ʨkuʔ kinaβalaiq niʔ jajaʔ mu ka raramat.
S.TRANSL: 我開始想念媽媽做的菜了。

S.FORM: 'i' kuwing uwi ga, kii' ci' cakaan cu' kaal 'i' ini wah 'i' maniq cku' qalang mi' la. humicuwa su' na' isu'?
S.PHON: ʔiʔ kuwiŋ uwi ɣa, kiiʔ ʦ~ʨiʔ ʦ~ʨakaan ʦ~ʨuʔ kaal ʔiʔ ini waħ ʔiʔ maniq ʦ~ʨkuʔ qalaŋ miʔ la. ħumiʦ~ʨuwa s~ɕuʔ naʔ is~ɕuʔ?

S.PHON: ʔiʔ kuwiŋ uwi ɣa, kiiʔ ʦ~ʨiʔ ʦ~ʨakaan ʦ~ʨuʔ kaal ʔiʔ ini waħ ʔiʔ maniq ʦ~ʨkuʔ qalaŋ miʔ la. ħumiʦ~ʨuwa s~ɕuʔ naʔ is~ɕuʔ?
S.TRANSL: 我也是，我已經半年沒有回老家吃飯了，你呢？

S.FORM: maqaqawh cu' 'i' matawwaw ru qutux ci' cu' kaal 'i' iqaat minnusa' 'i' qalang mi' la.
S.PHON: maqaqawħ ʦ~ʨuʔ ʔiʔ matawwaw ru qutux ʦ~ʨiʔ ʦ~ʨuʔ kaal ʔiʔ iqaat minnus~ɕaʔ ʔiʔ qalaŋ miʔ la.

S.TRANSL: 我也忙著工作，一年沒有回部落了。

S.FORM: magalgay ta' 'i' musa' 'i' tinqalangan ta' 'i' mahingaw ta'.
S.PHON: maɣalɣaj taʔ ʔiʔ mus~ɕaʔ ʔiʔ tinqalaŋan taʔ ʔiʔ maħiŋaw taʔ.
S.FORM: magalgay ta' 'i' musa' 'i' tinqalangan ta' 'i' mahingaw ta'.

S.TRANSL: 我們這個週末一起回去吧。

S.FORM: musa' cu 'i' imu' ga, makimaniq ci' cu' papah ru tinmamian ru rawhing, makimaniq ci' cu' bawwak na' lahulahu ru tinnabiq uwi.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ ʦ~ʨu ʔiʔ imuʔ ɣa, makimaniq ʦ~ʨiʔ ʦ~ʨuʔ papaħ ru tinmamian ru rawħiŋ, makimaniq ʦ~ʨiʔ ʦ~ʨuʔ βawwak naʔ laħulaħu ru tinnaβiq uwi.

S.TRANSL: 回家之後，除了糯米飯、醃肉之外，我希望還能吃到山蘇、山豬肉還有麻糬。

S.FORM: wal ga, naniqun na' Itaal cunga' ga, yani ku' tinahuq ni' yaya' a' balaiq 'i' niqun cubalay.
S.PHON: wal ɣa, naniqun naʔ itaal ʦ~ʨuŋaʔ ɣa, jani kuʔ tinaħuq niʔ jajaʔ aʔ βalaiq ʔiʔ niqun ʦ~ʨuβalaj.

S.TRANSL: 對啊，傳統的料理還是媽媽煮的最好吃。

S.FORM: nanuwan ku' sawaan su' na' isu'?

S.FORM: nanuwan ku' sawaan su' na' isu'?

S.FORM: yani ku' aynu' a' ini kahabag cubalay a' cuquliq?

S.FORM: yaku aynu' ka pinnabuwabuwan ku' patasan a' raqinas?

S.FORM: yaku aynu' ka pinnabuwabuwan ku' patasan a' raqinas?
S.PHON: jaku ajnuʔ ka pinnaβuwaβuwan kuʔ patas~ɕan aʔ raqinas~ɕ?
S.TRANSL: 有紋面傳統的民族主要有哪些？
泰雅族、太魯閣族、賽德克族等。

S.TRANSL: 我知道了，謝謝你的回答，讓我更認識台灣的原住民族。
難得（本文指少見你如此的早）
處所格格位標記（功能詞）
